r_ktm_voucher_pay_norm_epson_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE 1 = 1 AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '64ส00066' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ASC
